Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This is a list of games for the PlayStation 5. Physical games are sold on Ultra HD Blu-ray and digital games can be purchased through the PlayStation Store. The PlayStation 5 is backwards compatible with all but nine PlayStation 4 games.[1] This list only includes games that are released natively for PlayStation 5. PlayStation VR2 and backwards compatible games are excluded.[2]

There are currently 1113 games on this list.[a]

Key  CB  Supports cross-buy  CP  Supports cross-play  P  Pro enhanced

Notes

[edit]
  1. ^ This number is always up to date by this script.
  2. ^ Upgrade available only for owners of the Digital Edition.
  3. ^ Remastered collection of Star Wars: Battlefront and Star Wars: Battlefront II.
  4. ^ On 4 May 2021, the game was available early to active PlayStation Plus subscribers.

References

[edit]
  1. ^ Good, Owen (November 19, 2020). "Shadow Complex Remastered patched, now works on PS5". Polygon. Archived from the original on March 22, 2022. Retrieved November 20, 2020.
  2. ^ "PS4 to PS5: All Games with Confirmed Free Upgrades". Push Square. Archived from the original on June 10, 2022. Retrieved November 20, 2020.
  3. ^ "1917 - The Alien Invasion DX Remastered - Deluxe Edition - PS5". YouTube. January 2, 2025. Retrieved April 29, 2025.
